I will forfeit my unvested series seed preferred stock units upon separation. (2024-07-01)
Pursuant to my advisory board member agreement, I am eligible for carried interest distributions from NightDragon Growth II, L.P. I will forfeit my carried interest upon separation. (2024-03-01)
Unilever Unicare Preservation Non Qualified Retirement

Pursuant to my deferred compensation plan, I will receive a final payment at the one year anniversary (June 2025) of my departure from the company based on the firm’s profits during my employment period of 09/2021 to 06/2024. (2021-09-01)

Pursuant to my advisory board agreement, I will receive the remaining amount of cash owed to me that was held in escrow following the sale of this company. This amount reflects the remaining cash payment for my restricted stock units that vested upon the sale. (2023-05-01)

I will retain my unvested restricted stock. Pursuant to the Unilever performance share plan, my unvested restricted stock shares will vest annually according to the company vesting schedule. (2021-09-01)
My single-member LLC will be inactive during my appointment. Client fees will be fixed prior to assuming the duties of the position. (2025-05-01)

Pursuant to my consulting contract, I will receive the consulting fees owed to me under my consulting contract after completion of the company’s Summit in June 2025. This payment will be made prior to my assuming the duties of the position of Chief Information Officer. (2025-04-01)

The company has the option to grant shares to advisors upon a company event. If such an event occurs prior to my resignation and the company decides to grant me shares, I will divest my interest pursuant to my ethics agreement. (2024-06-01)
